{{Infobox Team |isdisbanded=yes |name= MeetYourMakers.TR |orgcountry= Germany |country= |region= TR |analysts= |image= MeetYourMakerslogo square.png |website= http://www.mymym.com/ |sponsor= [http://www.azubu.tv/ Azubu]
[http://g2a.com G2A] |twitter= myMYMcom |youtube= https://www.youtube.com/user/myMYMVideo |facebook=https://www.facebook.com/pages/MeetYourMakers/271601845980 |coaches= |manager= Furkan "'''Ortaq'''" Celebi |captain= |created= 2015-06-01 |disbanded= |trades= }}{{TOCRWI}} '''MeetYourMakers''' is a European based multi-gaming eSports organization that was founded in 2001[http://mymym.com/about-us/ MeetYourMakers About Us] ''mymym.com'' and has hosted dominant teams and players for games initially including WarCraft III, DoTA, and Counter-Strike. In March 2009, MYM's parent company, ESNation, went bankrupt[http://www.complexitygaming.com/news/608/ ESNation, MYM Bankrupt] ''complexitygaming.com'', but the organization was revived that August by a German company[http://www.sk-gaming.com/content/25831-MYM_to_return_in_less_than_eight_days MYM to return in less than eight days] ''sk-gaming.com''[http://www.esl.eu/eu/ems/spring2013/lol/team/4869227 ESL:MeetYourMakers] ''esl.eu''. Since reformation, MeetYourMakers has gone on to host teams in StarCraft 2, World of Tanks, FIFA, and League of Legends. == History == ===2015 Season=== The organization gave up their Challenger Series spot for the [[2015_EU_Challenger_Series/Summer_Season|Summer Season]], instead picking up a new roster to compete in the Turkish scene, with hopes of initially qualifying for the [[2015_Turkish_Promotion_League/Summer_Season|TPL Summer Season]] of the Turkish Promotion League. After meeting this goal, they went on to finish 1st in the regular season. They ultimately finished 3rd in the [[2015 Turkish Promotion League/Summer Playoffs|Summer Playoffs]] before losing to [[Oyun Hizmetleri]] in the [[TCL/2016 Season/Winter Qualifiers|2016 TCL Winter Qualifiers]]. ==Timeline== {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{listplayer/Start|newteam=yes|dates=yes}} {{listplayer|Silphi|de|Ömer Efe|Top|newteam=Imperial Esports|joined=2015-06-01|left=2015-09-??}} {{listplayer|React|tr|Mert Gül|Mid|newteam=Crew e-Sports Club|joined=2015-06-01|left=2015-09-??}} {{listplayer|S4mpe|se|Samuel Persson|AD|newteam=Imperial Esports|joined=2015-06-01|left=2015-09-??}} {{listplayer|Klajbajk|se|Johan Olsson|Support|newteam=Fnatic|joined=2015-06-01|left=2015-09-??}} {{listplayer|Halpern|tr|Aral Norman|sub=yes|Jungle|newteam=clk|joined=2015-07-11|left=2015-09-??}} {{listplayer|Ortaq|tr|Furkan Çelebi|sub=yes|Jungle|newteam=none|left=2015-09-??}} {{listplayer|Kadir|nl|Kadircan Mumcuoğlu|Jungle|newteam=Imperial Esports|joined=2015-06-01|left=2015-07-11}} {{listplayer/End}} ===Temporary Subs=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Role !Replacing !Tournament |-{{listplayer|Gilius|de|Erberk Demir|Jungle}} |{{none}} |[[Turkish Championship League/2016 Season/Winter Qualifiers|TCL 2016 Winter Qualifiers]] {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Organization == ===Current=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Position {{listplayersp|Ortaq|tr|Furkan Çelebi|'''Team Manager'''}} {{listplayersp||de|Jürgen Ehrhard|'''Managing Director'''}} {{listplayersp||de|Hardy Förster|'''Co-Owner'''}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} ===Former=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Position !Next Team {{listplayer|Revyls|de|Harun Yavuz|'''Director of eSports/Head Coach'''|newteam=Imperial Esports}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Images == == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== ==Articles== ==Other Content== ==Links== ==References==
